full_text:
Bao Rong 鮑融
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bao Rong (鮑融). Son of Bao Shao, to whom the inheritance went after Bao Shao’s death. Bao Rong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
